chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-81 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 25-10-2023 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Laghari, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sawand Khan Jagirani, Advocate for Respondents-SIDA Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General a/w SIP Muhammad Yakoob of PS Salehpat.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Counsel for the petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and he has been provided water to his land for irrigation purpose. Counsel for respondents No.2 to 5 has also filed compliance report. In view of above, the petition is accordingly disposed of having served its purpose. Order of issuance of BWS against SHO PS Salehpat is accordingly recalled. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
